very_drunk.speaker: The Kid
very_drunk.text: Uh. Mr.? You okay? You smell like my uncle at Thanksgiving. He's... not doing great these days.

buzzed.speaker: The Kid
buzzed.text: You seem... chill. That's cool I guess.

too_hot.speaker: The Kid
too_hot.text: Mr., there's been a weird car driving by a lot. Maybe log off for a while? I'm gonna log off.

knows_craig.speaker: The Kid
knows_craig.text: Wait. You know Craig? The truck guy? Dude. I can get into his security cameras. Just saying.

morning_intro.speaker: The Kid
morning_intro.text: 'Oh hey Mr. Want to see what I'm building? Been up since 4.'

late_afternoon_intro.speaker: The Kid
late_afternoon_intro.text: 'I've been up since 4am, Mr. Hands shaking. Could be caffeine. Could be adrenaline. Hard to tell.'

already_hacking_drunk.speaker: The Kid
already_hacking_drunk.text: The Kid is nervous. 'Mr., maybe come back when you're... stabler.'

already_hacking_injury.speaker: The Kid
already_hacking_injury.text: 'Dude, you okay? What happened to your arm?'

already_hacking_late.speaker: The Kid
already_hacking_late.text: 'I'm crashing from the Monsters, can we make this quick, Mr.?'

already_hacking_default.text: The Kid pushes the laptop toward you. 'Check this out. Their security is literally the word password.'

intro.speaker: The Kid
intro.text: Hey Mr. You know anything about computers? Like... network stuff?

choices.text: "I used to do IT support, actually"
"I can barely work the TV remote"

beats.speaker: The Kid
beats.text: Fingers blurring on the keyboard. Monster Energy to the left. No blinking.
On screen: green text, a scroll of IP addresses, a live feed of SOMEONE'S LIVING ROOM.

beats.speaker: The Kid
beats.text: "Yeah that's the Hendersons. They never changed the default password. Want me to flip their lights?"

beats.speaker: Dad
beats.text: "Uh. Cool. Very... cool." Nodding. Pretending. Horrified. Curious.

decline.text: The Kid shrugs. 'Boomer energy.' You are 38.
